sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Kitchen orchestration variants
queue.reason: Only expand kitchen management if future work adds dietary constraints, cooperative roles, richer station dependencies, accessible timer narration, inventory forecasting, or multi-course pacing rather than more recipe labels.

queue.title: River delta simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand delta stewardship if future work adds explicit downstream flow narration, multi-community negotiation, fisheries and navigation tradeoffs, climate scenarios, or richer sediment transport rather than more project labels.

queue.title: Accessible geometry variants
queue.reason: Only expand spatial reasoning if future work adds multi-piece composition, tactile-display guidance, spoken transformation sequences, collaborative proofs, or deeper symmetry and area tradeoffs rather than more silhouettes.

queue.title: Food web simulation variants
queue.reason: Only expand ecological play if future work adds richer trophic uncertainty, accessible relationship narration, multi-pool migration, conservation ethics, or deeper climate and invasive-species tradeoffs rather than more species labels.

queue.title: Transit dispatch variants
queue.reason: Only expand transit play if future work adds accessible route narration, multiple interacting lines, vehicle breakdown recovery, fare and labor ethics, or richer passenger-destination models rather than more station labels.

queue.title: Urban heat planning variants
queue.reason: Only expand civic heat planning if future work adds nonvisual neighborhood summaries, transit and housing displacement tradeoffs, multi-district coordination, public-health ethics, or richer weather and maintenance models rather than more intervention labels.

queue.title: Harbor piloting variants
queue.reason: Only expand harbor play if future work adds distinct vessel handling, accessible route narration, multi-ship traffic, maritime safety ethics, or richer tide and cargo tradeoffs rather than more obstacle labels.

queue.title: Orchard genetics variants
queue.reason: Only expand orchard play if future work adds explicit allele models, accessible lineage summaries, multi-orchard exchange, biodiversity ethics, or richer pest and pollination tradeoffs rather than more fruit labels.

queue.title: Packet routing variants
queue.reason: Only expand packet-routing play if future work adds distinct protocol grammars, accessible route summaries, multi-destination traffic, trust-boundary ethics, or richer congestion and redundancy tradeoffs rather than more component labels.

queue.title: Circuit construction variants
queue.reason: Only expand circuit play if future work adds parallel branches, capacitors, nonvisual topology summaries, cooperative repair, component tolerances, or richer alternating-current behavior rather than more tile labels.

queue.title: Braille learning variants
queue.reason: Only expand Braille play if future work adds contracted Braille, punctuation and number signs, tactile-display guidance, richer whole-word relay structure, or stronger nonvisual summaries rather than more letter labels.

queue.title: Morphology puzzle variants
queue.reason: Only expand morphology play if future work adds distinct language families, pronunciation or screen-reader summaries, collaborative word chains, etymology uncertainty, or richer semantic ambiguity rather than more affix labels.

recentDecisions.title: Kitchen Pass 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local kitchen-management strategy game with simultaneous guest orders, four dependent stations, recipe sequencing, cooking and holding time, quality, patience, coins, reputation and waste tradeoffs, three modes, adaptive order pressure, failure recovery, scoring, session-only Rush and tasting-menu unlocks, touch, pointer and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Delta Steward 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local river-delta strategy simulation with a live ten-by-ten canvas, eight seasons, water and sediment flow, wetlands, levees, diversions and dredging, settlement safety, habitat and budget tradeoffs, adaptive storms, failure recovery, balanced scoring, a session-only Cyclone unlock, touch, pointer and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Tactile Geometry Workshop 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local spatial-reasoning workshop with SVG and text-equivalent boards, translation, rotation and reflection puzzles, three adaptive modes, move budgets, hints, scoring, streaks, failure recovery, a session-only Mirror unlock, pointer-swipe, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Tidepool Food Web 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local ecological strategy game with a five-species SVG food web, ten seasonal tides, population interactions, habitat and pollution systems, targeted reintroduction, refuge and cleanup tradeoffs, adaptive modes, stochastic runoff shocks, collapse and recovery, scoring, a session-only Storm unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Metro Dispatch 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local transit-dispatch strategy game with a live six-station SVG network, three train classes, passenger queues, shortest-path routing, timed demand, incidents, energy and repair tradeoffs, service-equity scoring, adaptive modes, failure and recovery, a session-only Express and Disruption unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Heat Island Planner 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local urban heat-equity simulation with an eight-by-eight city grid, five intervention types, escalating heatwave days, budget, energy and maintenance tradeoffs, vulnerable-resident coverage, emergency recovery, adaptive modes, scoring, a session-only reflective roof and Crisis unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Harbor Pilot 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local canvas harbor-piloting game with continuous momentum, wind and current, three vessel profiles, docking contracts, collision and fuel recovery, adaptive modes, combo scoring, session-only cutter and storm unlocks, pointer, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Orchard Graft Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local orchard genetics strategy game with nine persistent plots, five rootstocks, graft-based trait combinations, seasonal water and labor budgets, climate shocks, yield and diversity contracts, adaptive modes, failure recovery, scoring, a session-only crabapple unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Packet Harbor 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local packet-routing strategy game with procedural five-by-five networks, three packet classes, latency, integrity and capacity contracts, corruption hazards, limited component budgets, adaptive modes, failure diagnosis and recovery, scoring, a session-only relay unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Circuit Salvage Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local circuit-construction puzzle with procedural five-by-five boards, rotatable wire and component tiles, voltage and heat contracts, limited salvage budgets, adaptive modes, failure diagnosis and recovery, scoring, a session-only insulated bridge unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.
